tasks.subject: Task 0: Baseline capture
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Record a green offline baseline so every later task compares against a known-good state.

**Files:** none modified.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Offline suite result captured to scratchpad/baseline.txt.
- [ ] Working tree clean at start.

**Verify:** `git status --porcelain` empty; `pixi run test` exit 0 captured.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git status --porcelain; pixi run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["baseline.txt captured", "tree clean"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: RunPod generation configs + delete DEAD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rename the 10 RunPod text/image-gen configs to the new scheme and delete the DEAD collision config. See plan doc Task 1 for full git mv list + sweep commands.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_wan_t2v_graph_shape.py tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py -q` PASS; stale-grep empty; `pixi run test` PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/wan.yaml", "examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan-t2v.yaml", "examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan.yaml", "examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan-t2v-1_3b.yaml", "examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan-t2v-5b.yaml", "examples/configs/runpod-comfyui-wan-t2v-14b-2_2.yaml", "examples/configs/runpod-diffusers-wan-t2v-14b-2_2.yaml", "examples/configs/wan21-1_3b-lora-flexible-warm-reuse-smoke.yaml", "examples/configs/wan21-1_3b-strength-grid.yaml", "examples/configs/wan22-14b-lora-flexible-warm-reuse-release.yaml", "examples/configs/wan22-14b-strength-grid.yaml", "tests/test_examples.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_wan_t2v_graph_shape.py tests/examples/test_runpod_comfyui_wan_graph.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["10 git mv renames", "DEAD deleted zero refs", "10 old basenames zero non-frozen hits", "test_examples.py resolves", "verify gate passes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Grid cells + grid sweep specs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rename 5 grid base cells (full prefix) + 9 .grid.yaml sweep specs (version-normalize); update sweep-spec config: cell paths and _grid_examples/*.json spec: paths. Cells swept BEFORE sweep-spec files renamed. See plan doc Task 6.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_grid_spec.py tests/core/test_grid_errors.py -q` PASS; stale-grep empty; `pixi run test` PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/grids/wan21-14b-base-no-loras.yaml", "examples/configs/grids/wan21-1_3b-base-no-loras.yaml", "examples/configs/grids/wan21-1_3b-base.yaml", "examples/configs/grids/wan21-5b-base-no-loras.yaml", "examples/configs/grids/wan22-14b-base.yaml", "examples/configs/grids/wan21-model-sweep.grid.yaml", "examples/configs/grids/wan22-14b-strength-sweep.grid.yaml", "tests/live/_grid_examples", "tests/core/test_grid_spec.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_grid_spec.py tests/core/test_grid_errors.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["14 git mv renames", "sweep config: points at new cells", "_grid_examples spec: updated", "old basenames zero non-frozen hits", "verify gate passes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Manifest rename + final global verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rename the model-bearing manifest and prove the whole refactor clean: zero stale basenames outside frozen archives, full suite green, pre-commit green. See plan doc Task 7.

**Verify:** `pixi run test` PASS (>= baseline); global stale-grep no MISS; `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files` clean.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/manifests/runpod-comfyui-wan-manifest.yaml", "tests/test_examples.py", "README.md", "PROGRESS.md", "successful-generations.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test && pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["manifest renamed zero refs", "global stale-grep no MISS", "full suite PASS >= baseline", "pre-commit clean", "docstring corrected"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
